flashcards.q: What is the calorie requirement for rural areas in India?
What is the calorie requirement for urban areas in India?
What does NITI Aayog use to analyze poverty in India?
How many indicators does the National Multidimensional Poverty Index use?
What are the three broad dimensions of the National Multidimensional Poverty Index?
flashcards.a: Health, education, and standard of living.

flashcards.q: What was the multidimensional poverty ratio in India in 2019-21?
How many people escaped multidimensional poverty in India during 2015-2021?
What was Ram Saran's monthly earning when employed?
What was Lakha Singh's daily wage for a hard day's work?
flashcards.a: ₹200 or payment in kind like wheat, dal, or vegetables.

flashcards.q: Define social exclusion.
flashcards.a: A process through which individuals or groups are excluded from facilities, benefits, and opportunities that others enjoy.

flashcards.q: Define vulnerability in the context of poverty.
flashcards.a: A measure describing the greater probability of certain communities or individuals becoming or remaining poor.

flashcards.q: What is the Head Count Ratio (HCR)?
flashcards.a: The proportion of people below the poverty line in a given population.

flashcards.q: What was India's consumption-based poverty ratio in 2011-12?
What was India's multidimensional poverty ratio in 2015-16?
Which states had Head Count Ratio less than 10 percent in 2019-21?
flashcards.a: Kerala, Tamil Nadu, Delhi, Punjab, Himachal Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh, Haryana, Maharashtra.

flashcards.q: What percentage of Scheduled Tribes are below poverty line?
What percentage of Scheduled Castes are below poverty line?
What percentage of rural agricultural labourers are below poverty line?
What percentage of urban casual labourers are below poverty line?
What is the global poverty line used by the World Bank?
What was China's poverty ratio in 2020?
What is the full form of MGNREGA?
flashcards.a: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act.

flashcards.q: How many days of wage employment does MGNREGA provide per household?
What is the reservation for women under MGNREGA?
What is the full form of PM Poshan?
Which classes does PM Poshan target?
flashcards.a: Classes I to VIII in government and government-aided schools.

flashcards.q: When was Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan launched?
When was Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana launched?
Who are the target beneficiaries of PM Ujjwala Yojana?
flashcards.a: BPL households, SC, ST, forest dwellers, and marginalized groups.

flashcards.q: In whose name are LPG connections issued under PM Ujjwala Yojana?
flashcards.a: In the name of the female member of the family.

flashcards.q: What was India's growth rate in the 1970s?
What was India's growth rate during the 1980s and 1990s?
What is the poverty ratio in Kerala as per 2011 census?
flashcards.a: Kerala had literacy rate of 94%, with corresponding low poverty.

flashcards.q: What approach did Kerala adopt to reduce poverty?
What approach did West Bengal adopt to reduce poverty?
What approach did Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu adopt to reduce poverty?
What is human poverty?
flashcards.a: A broader concept of poverty that includes lack of education, shelter, healthcare, job security, self-confidence, and freedom from discrimination.

flashcards.q: What did Mahatma Gandhi say about India's independence?
flashcards.a: India would be truly independent only when the poorest of its people become free of human suffering.

flashcards.q: What was the global extreme poverty ratio in 2019?
What was the global extreme poverty ratio in 2010?
What was South Asia's poverty ratio in 2021?
What is SDG 1?
flashcards.a: No Poverty—end poverty in all its forms everywhere by 2030.
